title: Replace unnecessary AstSel::widthp() child node with const in node
body:
AstSel is a very common node, and AstSel::widthp() is always an AstConst, and it always fits an `int`, so there is no point in actually carrying a 240 byte AstConst node for this, just use a 4 byte member `int` instead.

This is worth ~10% Verilation speed on some RTLMeter cases.

Output is perturbed due to some node count thresholds in optimizations being hit differently, but no functional change.
